steps.title: Draw the rarity conclusion
steps.content: The passage says some Bronze Age hoards contained gold, but gold was much rarer than bronze. A logical result is that not every hoard would contain gold.

steps.title: Reject unsupported explanations
steps.content: B claims gold objects were melted down, which the passage never says. C discusses adapting bronze-working skills to gold, which is not tied to rarity. D concerns how hoards were discovered, not whether they contained rare gold. The answer is A.
